headline: OpenAI co-founder Karpathy joins Anthropic amid SDK shift
body: Andrej Karpathy, former Tesla AI leader and OpenAI co-founder, has joined Anthropic in a significant leadership move. The hire arrives as Anthropic discontinues its Stainless SDK, forcing healthcare developers to migrate integration workflows or build alternatives. For healthcare organizations deploying Claude-based clinical decision support or EHR automation, this signals leadership stability at the model provider while requiring near-term technical planning around API integration tooling. The vendor consolidation trend underscores why healthcare systems must evaluate long-term sustainability and support roadmaps when selecting AI foundation model partners for mission-critical workflows.
